readinessChecks.check: resolveAsOfDate uses resolveCurrentDate by default (no hardcoded date)
Future-date rows in StockQuote/MarketIndex can be excluded by gate
All output artifacts created and parseable
No forbidden performance terms in new artifacts
No DB writes in gate modules
No external API calls in gate modules

warnReasons: Future-date rows (2026-05-18) exist in StockQuote and MarketIndex. Query-layer gate is in place but DB data pipeline has not been corrected. Status WARN until source pipeline is fixed.
/api/strategy/screen and /api/stocks/[id]/detail do not yet integrate asOf gate (minimal integration deferred to reduce risk of strategy mutation).
/api/stocks/[id]/history uses external API (twseApi) — cannot add as-of gate in P0-01; listed as P0-02.
rationale: Core as-of data gate and MVP universe lock are implemented with 83 passing tests. Future-date quarantine is operational at the query layer. WARN status reflects known data pipeline issues and deferred API integration, not implementation failures.

nextRound.title: Shadow Prediction Log Contract
